summary: M1-T009 ACCEPTED (29th): pre-paid-traffic connector resilience (TTL+LRU versioned cache, exact RFC-9110 Retry-After, jittered deterministic backoff, per-source breaker, LKG with visible staleness through existing provenance channels - never silently fresh, typed per-analysis budget).
